title: Paris, 13th District
tmdbOverview: Émilie meets Camille who is attracted to Nora, who crosses paths with Amber. Three girls and a boy – They're friends, sometimes lovers and often both.
synopsis: Paris, 13th District is a 2021 drama and romance film from France. It holds a solid 7.0 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
